title: Vz-GAL Dusty Star-Forming Galaxies: Revisiting the CO-H2 Conversion Factor Tension
summary: The CO luminosity-to-H$_2$ mass conversion factor ($α_{CO}$) remains a debated uncertainty in determining molecular gas masses of high-redshift dusty star-forming galaxies (DSFGs). Dynamical mass constraints have often favored $α_{CO}=0.8$~$M_{\odot}~{(K~km~{s}^{-1}~{pc}^{2})}^{-1}$, whereas dust- and radiative-transfer-based methods imply higher values. We revisit this ``tension" using the largest homogeneous sample of 21 unlensed $z\sim1-4$ DSFGs, with securely measured \coonezero luminosities from the VLA \vzgal survey and resolved ($\sim{0.1}^{\prime\prime}$) ALMA 1~mm dust continuum imaging. For 12 galaxies with robust modeling constraints, we derive molecular gas masses using dust spectral energy distribution modeling and the TUNER LVG framework, adopting a solar-metallicity gas-to-dust mass ratio of 100. Although not fully independent due to shared assumptions on dust properties, these approaches yield mutually consistent gas masses corresponding to $α_{CO}\sim1.5-11.5$, with a median near the Galactic $α_{CO}=4.3$. Isotropic virial dynamical masses agree with these gas masses when realistic molecular gas sizes are adopted, while our proposed ``mixed" (rotating, pressure-supported, thick-disk) estimator systematically underestimates dynamical masses, producing low $α_{CO}$ limits. Using GN20 ($z=4.055$) as a case study, we show that resolved gas geometry and kinematics reconcile the discrepancy with LVG-derived $α_{CO}$. Our results suggest that current data do not require $α_{CO}=0.8$, and intermediate to near-Galactic values remain dynamically viable given uncertainties in gas geometry, dust properties, and gas-to-dust ratios. Further progress in calibrating $α_{CO}$ in the early universe will require resolved molecular gas observations, physically motivated ISM modeling, and stringent constraints on dust properties.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用21个高红移（z=1-4）尘埃星暴星系（DSFGs）的最大均匀样本，结合VLA的CO(1-0)观测和ALMA高分辨率1mm尘埃连续谱成像，重新审视了CO-to-H₂转换因子αCO的争论。通过尘埃SED建模和LVG框架推导分子气体质量，发现αCO的中值接近银河系值4.3（范围1.5-11.5），挑战了此前流行的αCO=0.8。研究表明，采用合理的气体尺度时，各向同性维里质量与气体质量一致，而"混合"模型会低估动力学质量。当前数据并不强制要求αCO=0.8，近银河系值在动力学上仍是可行的。
AI.motivation: 解决高红移DSFGs中CO-to-H₂转换因子αCO的争议——动力学质量约束倾向于αCO=0.8，而尘埃和辐射传输方法给出更高值。作者希望通过大样本、高分辨率数据系统性地重新评估这一"张力"。
AI.method: 使用VLA VZGAL巡天中21个未被引力透镜的z=1-4 DSFGs的CO(1-0)光度，结合ALMA~0.1角秒分辨率的1mm尘埃连续谱成像。对12个有可靠建模约束的星系，采用尘埃SED建模和TUNER LVG框架推导分子气体质量，假设太阳金属丰度和气尘比100。此外进行各向同性维里质量和"混合"（旋转+压力支撑厚盘）动力学质量计算。
AI.result: 尘埃SED和LVG方法得到相互一致的气体质量，对应αCO~1.5-11.5，中值接近银河系值4.3。各向同性维里质量在采用实际分子气体尺度时与气体质量一致；而"混合"动力学模型系统性地低估动力学质量，产生较低的αCO上限。以GN20（z=4.055）为例，展示气体几何和动力学分布可调和与LVG推导αCO的差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前数据不要求αCO=0.8，中间值到近银河系值在考虑气体几何、尘埃特性和气尘比的不确定性后仍然是动力学可行的。未来需通过分辨分子气体观测、物理驱动的ISM建模以及对尘埃性质的严格约束来进一步校准早期宇宙的αCO。

artifacts.abstract_zh: CO光度与H₂质量转换因子（α_CO）仍是确定高红移尘埃恒星形成星系（DSFGs）分子气体质量的一个有争议的不确定因素。动力学质量约束通常倾向于α_CO=0.8 M⊙ (K km s⁻¹ pc²)⁻¹，而基于尘埃和辐射传输的方法则暗示更高的值。我们利用来自VLA Vz-GAL巡天的21个无透镜z~1-4 DSFGs的最大均匀样本（具有可靠测量的CO(1-0)光度）以及分辨（~0.1″）的ALMA 1 mm尘埃连续谱成像，重新审视了这一“张力”。对于12个具有稳健建模约束的星系，我们采用尘埃光谱能量分布建模和TUNER LVG框架推导分子气体质量，并采用太阳金属丰度的气尘质量比100。尽管由于共享尘埃性质假设而并非完全独立，这些方法得出了相互一致的气体质量，对应α_CO~1.5-11.5，中值接近银河系值α_CO=4.3。当采用现实的分子气体尺度时，各向同性维里动力学质量与这些气体质量一致，而我们提出的“混合”（旋转、压力支撑、厚盘）估计器则系统性地低估了动力学质量，产生较低的α_CO上限。以GN20（z=4.055）为例，我们展示了分辨的气体几何和运动学如何调和了与LVG推导的α_CO之间的差异。我们的结果表明，当前数据不要求α_CO=0.8，并且考虑到气体几何、尘埃特性和气尘比的不确定性，中间值到近银河系值在动力学上仍然是可行的。进一步校准早期宇宙中α_CO的进展将需要分辨的分子气体观测、物理驱动的ISM建模以及对尘埃性质的严格约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：当前数据不要求α_CO=0.8，中间值到近银河系值在考虑气体几何、尘埃特性和气尘比的不确定性后仍然是动力学可行的。未来需通过分辨分子气体观测、物理驱动的ISM建模以及对尘埃性质的严格约束来进一步校准早期宇宙的α_CO。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Classification of the V z -GAL high- z dusty galaxies as lensed or unlensed sources, their CO(1–0) line fluxes and redshift distribution. We find that DSFGs at lower line fluxes show a higher fraction of unlensed galaxies, as expected.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：Vz-GAL高红移尘埃星系作为透镜或非透镜源的分类，它们的CO(1–0)线通量和红移分布。我们发现，较低线通量的DSFGs显示出更高比例的非透镜星系，正如预期。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : ALMA 1 mm dust contours of the selected V z -GAL unlensed sources (Table 1 ) overlaid onto the optical images (HST/F110W, Subaru/HSC Y-band, and the SDSS) of the fields. Each image panel shown here is about \(3^{\prime\prime}\) wide; i.e., it shows an area within roughly one synthesized beam of VLA V z -GAL CO(1–0) observations. All the contour levels start at 4 \(\sigma\) and increase in steps of 4 \(\sigma\) up to 40 \(\sigma\) , followed by a 10 \(\sigma\) increase up to 100 \(\sigma\) . ALMA beam sizes are shown in the lower left corners of each panel. We also show a 5 kpc scale at the corresponding redshift for each source.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：所选Vz-GAL非透镜源（表1）的ALMA 1 mm尘埃轮廓叠加在光学图像（HST/F110W、Subaru/HSC Y波段和SDSS）上。此处显示的每个图像面板宽约\(3^{\prime\prime}\)；即，它显示了VLA Vz-GAL CO(1–0)观测的一个合成波束内的区域。所有轮廓水平从4 \(\sigma\)开始，以4 \(\sigma\)的步长增加到40 \(\sigma\)，然后以10 \(\sigma\)的步长增加到100 \(\sigma\)。ALMA波束尺寸显示在每个面板的左下角。我们还为每个源显示了对应红移处的5 kpc尺度。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Identified isolated, unlensed sources from the V z -GAL fields. See \(\S\) II.1 for details.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：从Vz-GAL场中识别出的孤立、非透镜源。详见\(\S\) II.1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Left panel: Observed major and minor axes of the targets using ALMA 1 mm observations. Right panel: Dust inclination angle distribution of the sources as compared to their derived dust sizes. The median inclination angle is consistent with that expected for randomly oriented disks in the sky, corresponding to \(\langle{i}\rangle=1\) ( \(i={57.3}^{\circ}\) ) or \(\langle{{sin}^{2}(i)}\rangle=2/3\) ( \(i={54.7}^{\circ}\) ). These values should not be confused with the commonly adopted average inclination factor using \(\langle{{sin}(i)}\rangle=\pi/4\simeq 0.79\) , used in earlier studies (e.g., Neri et al. , 2003 ; Bothwell et al. , 2013 ) ; see Appendix VII.4 for further discussion.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左图：使用ALMA 1 mm观测得到的目标观测长轴和短轴。右图：源的尘埃倾角分布与其推导的尘埃尺度比较。中值倾角与随机取向盘在天空中的预期一致，对应\(\langle{i}\rangle=1\)（\(i={57.3}^{\circ}\)）或\(\langle{{sin}^{2}(i)}\rangle=2/3\)（\(i={54.7}^{\circ}\)）。这些值不应与早期研究中常用的平均倾角因子\(\langle{{sin}(i)}\rangle=\pi/4\simeq 0.79\)混淆（例如，Neri et al., 2003；Bothwell et al., 2013）；详见附录VII.4。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Correlation between inclination angle and ellipticity of a disk. Both parameters depend on the observed axis ratio ‘q’. Left panel: Variation in inclination-angle contribution to the dynamical mass ( \(M_{dyn}\) ) — via \({sin}^{-2}(i)\) factor (Bothwell et al. , 2013 , Eqn. 8 ) — with assumed intrinsic thickness ( \(q_{0}\) ) of the disk. For all \(q_{0}\) values and near face-on systems, a steeper increase in observed inclination angles is expected with a smaller rise in ellipticity. Right panel: A specific case of \(q_{0}=0.2\) , as assumed in this work. Derived inclination angles are sensitive to the measured dust axis ratio, not the major axis alone.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：盘倾角与椭圆度之间的相关性。两个参数都依赖于观测轴比‘q’。左图：倾角对动力学质量（\(M_{dyn}\)）的贡献变化——通过\({sin}^{-2}(i)\)因子（Bothwell et al., 2013，方程8）——与假设的盘固有厚度（\(q_{0}\)）的关系。对于所有\(q_{0}\)值和近正面系统，预期观测倾角会随着椭圆度的较小增加而更陡地增加。右图：\(q_{0}=0.2\)的特例，如本工作所假设。推导的倾角对测量的尘埃轴比敏感，而不仅仅是长轴。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Dust sizes, inclination angles, assumed velocity dispersion, and integrated CO(1–0) line properties of the targeted DSFGs.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：目标DSFGs的尘埃尺度、倾角、假设的速度弥散和积分CO(1–0)线性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : HerBS-51 ( \(z=2.183\) ) as an example of the GMBB approach to fit the dust SED.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：HerBS-51（\(z=2.183\)）作为GMBB方法拟合尘埃SED的示例。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Far-infrared SED-derived dust masses of the down-selected 12 sources. These results are derived using the GMBB approach combined with the resolved dust sizes (see \(\S\) III.2.1 ).
figures.caption_zh: 表3：从12个精选源中推导的远红外SED尘埃质量。这些结果是使用GMBB方法结合分辨的尘埃尺度得出的（见\(\S\) III.2.1）。

title: VENUS: an ultra-faint galaxy hosting the metal-poor type II supernova at $z=5.13$ Witnessing the initial metal enrichment with extremely frequent core-collapse supernovae?
comment: Submitted to ApJ. Comments are welcome!
summary: We present the first characterization of the host galaxy of a recently discovered type IIP SN at $z=5.13$ (SN Eos). SN Eos and its host galaxy are gravitationally lensed and multiply imaged. The total magnification $μ\sim53$ enables spatially resolving the system, allowing us to localize the core-collapse supernova (CCSN) position and to characterize its local environment within an early galaxy. Our observation reveals that the host is an ultra-faint ($M_{\rm UV}=-14.4\pm0.3$ mag) Lyman-$α$ emitter with a very high equivalent width. The host galaxy also shows very weak [O iii]4959,5007 lines despite an H$α$ line detection ([O iii]5007/H$β<0.7$ with case B recombination). Assuming that the weak [O iii] is due to low gas-phase metallicity given the low-metallicity of SN Eos itself, SN Eos plausibly marks the formation and explosion of a metal-poor star in an extremely metal-poor environment ($<1\ \%\ Z_\odot$), facilitating the initial stages of the chemical enrichment of the host. Finding the CCSN in such an ultra-faint galaxy at $z=5.13$ also indicates that the SN rate could be considerably higher in high-$z$, metal-poor environments, potentially implying e.g., a $Z$-dependent IMF, $Z$-dependent massive star explodability, or runaway stellar collisions in dense star clusters. Without lensing, only SN Eos would be detectable and the host would be below the detection limit in any NIRCam surveys ever performed. The Eos host galaxy can thus be representative of the origin of {\it hostless} supernovae frequently found in JWST blank field surveys.

AI.tldr: 本文首次表征了红移z=5.13的IIP型超新星Eos及其引力透镜主星系，发现该星系是一个极端贫金属（<1%太阳丰度）的紫外超暗Lyman-α发射体，SN Eos的发现表明高红移贫金属环境中超新星发生率可能显著更高，并可能解释JWST巡天中频繁发现的"无宿主"超新星现象。
AI.motivation: 对高红移（z=5.13）超新星Eos的宿主星系进行首次表征，以理解早期宇宙中超新星爆发环境及其对星系化学增丰的贡献。
AI.method: 利用引力透镜效应（总放大率μ~53）对SN Eos及其宿主星系进行高分辨率空间解析，定位核塌缩超新星位置并表征其局域环境；通过光谱观测分析宿主星系的紫外光度、Lyman-α发射线等值宽度、[O III]与Hα谱线强度等特征。
AI.result: 宿主星系为紫外超暗（M_UV=-14.4±0.3 mag）的Lyman-α发射体，具有高等值宽度但[O III]谱线极弱（[O III]5007/Hβ<0.7），表明气体相金属丰度极低（<1%太阳丰度）。
AI.conclusion: SN Eos标志着极端贫金属环境中金属贫乏恒星的形成与爆发，推动了宿主星系的早期化学增丰；高红移贫金属环境中超新星发生率可能更高，暗示恒星初始质量函数或大质量恒星爆炸性可能依赖金属丰度，或致密星团中存在 runaway 恒星碰撞；此类超亮星系可作为JWST巡天中"无宿主"超新星的代表性起源。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们首次描述了最近在红移z=5.13处发现的IIP型超新星（SN Eos）的宿主星系。SN Eos及其宿主星系受到引力透镜效应并产生多重成像。总放大率μ~53使我们能够对该系统进行空间分辨，从而定位核坍缩超新星（CCSN）的位置，并表征其在早期星系内的局部环境。我们的观测揭示，该宿主是一个极暗弱（M_UV=-14.4±0.3 mag）的莱曼α发射体，具有非常高的等值宽度。尽管探测到了Hα线，但宿主星系的[O III]4959,5007线非常弱（在B型复合条件下[O III]5007/Hβ<0.7）。假设弱的[O III]是由于低气体相金属丰度（与SN Eos本身的低金属丰度一致），那么SN Eos很可能标志着在极端贫金属环境（<1% Z_⊙）中一颗贫金属恒星的形成与爆发，从而推动了宿主星系化学增丰的初始阶段。在红移z=5.13的极暗弱星系中发现CCSN也表明，在高红移、贫金属环境中，超新星发生率可能相当高，这可能暗示例如依赖于金属丰度的初始质量函数、依赖于金属丰度的大质量恒星可爆炸性，或致密星团中的逃逸恒星碰撞。如果没有引力透镜效应，只有SN Eos本身可被探测到，而宿主星系将低于任何已进行的NIRCam巡天的探测极限。因此，Eos宿主星系可能代表了JWST空白场巡天中频繁发现的“无宿主”超新星的典型起源。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，SN Eos标志着极端贫金属环境中贫金属恒星的形成与爆发，推动了宿主星系的早期化学增丰；高红移贫金属环境中超新星发生率可能更高，暗示恒星初始质量函数或大质量恒星爆炸性可能依赖金属丰度，或致密星团中存在逃逸恒星碰撞；此类极暗弱星系可作为JWST巡天中“无宿主”超新星的代表性起源。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST /NIRCam images of the SN Eos host galaxy. Left : the NIRCam RGB image (blue: F115W+F150W, green: F200W+F277W, red: F356W+F444W). The critical curve at \(z=5.13\) is shown in yellow, obtained from the latest lens model (Allingham et al. , 2026 ) . SN Eos stands out as the bright and red, doubly-imaged source. The source is quintuply imaged in total, and the highest two magnification images (image 1 and image 2) near the critical line are magnified by \(\mu\sim 27\) . The NIRSpec follow-up observation was taken with the S200A1 fixed-slit via the program DD-9493, and their slit positions are denoted by the white rectangles. The cutout image is \(4.\!^{\prime\prime}0\) wide. Middle : NIRCam stacked image of the rest-frame UV (F090W+F115W+F150W). The host galaxy is marginally detected at the same position of SN Eos . Red circles have a \(r=0.\!^{\prime\prime}07\) radius. Right : NIRCam stacked image of strong rest-optical emission line filters with point-source subtraction. With point-source subtraction, a lensed arc structure can be seen symmetrically imaged across the critical line. The blue contour presents the moment-zero map of the Ly \(\alpha\) line taken with VLT/MUSE. The Ly \(\alpha\) line emission is spatially offset from the position of the UV clump and SN Eos , and associated with the lensed arc structure.

title: A Rest-frame K-band View of Bulge Growth in Massive Dusty Star-forming Galaxies at z~2
comment: See Figure 4 for the key result that the stacked F770W and ALMA 870 micron profiles agree closely out to 8 kpc. Comments are welcome. Submitted to ApJ
summary: We study bulge formation in 16 massive dusty star-forming galaxies at z~2 by combining JWST MIRI F770W imaging, NIRCam imaging in eight bands, and ALMA 870 um data. At the median redshift of z=2.18, the F770W band probes the rest-frame 2.4 um light, close to the rest-frame K band, and traces the stellar mass distribution with little effect from dust attenuation. The effective radii measured in F770W agree with those of the 870 um dust emission, with a median ratio of 0.95, and are typically 23% smaller than those in F444W. The rest-frame K-band imaging is therefore essential to measure the true extent of the stellar mass, which is as compact as the dusty star-forming regions. In stacks of the 16 galaxies at a matched resolution, the 870 um and F770W profiles agree closely out to 8 kpc, and a bulge plus disk decomposition of the F770W stack gives a bulge-to-total ratio of 0.50. Fitting the SEDs in radial bins with CIGALE, we find that the attenuation decreases from Av=2.6 mag at the center to 1.5 mag at $r\gtrsim7$ kpc, while the specific star formation rate profile is flat. In these galaxies the bulge is already in place, and the whole system grows toward compact quiescent galaxies within about 1 Gyr. In two galaxies, by contrast, the 870 um emission is 3 to 6 times more compact than the F770W light, which suggests that they are still in the bulge-building compaction phase. Our sample may thus catch massive galaxies in several phases of bulge formation.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用JWST和ALMA数据，分析了红移z~2的16个巨大尘埃星暴星系中的核球形成过程。发现静止帧K波段（F770W）与870微米尘埃辐射的尺度高度一致，核球占总质量比约50%，并且系统在约10亿年内向致密静止星系演化。
AI.motivation: 理解高红移（z~2）大质量尘埃星暴星系中核球结构的形成机制，探究它们如何演化为致密的静止星系。
AI.method: 结合JWST MIRI F770W成像、NIRCam八个波段数据以及ALMA 870微米数据，对16个星系进行结构分解（核球-盘）、径向SED拟合（CIGALE）和堆叠分析。
AI.result: 1）F770W有效半径与870微米辐射尺度高度一致（中位数比值0.95），比F444W测得的半径小23%；2）堆叠分析显示核球-盘分解得到核球占比0.50；3）消光从中心Av=2.6 mag降至外围1.5 mag，比恒星形成率剖面平坦；4）两个星系的870微米比F770W紧凑3-6倍，处于核球形成压实阶段。
AI.conclusion: 这些星系正处于核球形成的不同阶段：多数星系核球已形成，将在大约10亿年内演化为致密静止星系；少数星系仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。静止帧K波段成像对测量恒星质量真实分布至关重要。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过结合JWST MIRI F770W成像、八个波段的NIRCam成像以及ALMA 870微米数据，研究了红移z~2处16个大规模尘埃恒星形成星系的核球形成。在z=2.18的中位红移处，F770W波段探测静止帧2.4微米光，接近静止帧K波段，并且几乎不受尘埃消光影响地追踪恒星质量分布。在F770W中测量的有效半径与870微米尘埃发射的有效半径一致，中位比值为0.95，并且通常比F444W中的有效半径小23%。因此，静止帧K波段成像对于测量恒星质量的真实范围至关重要，该范围与尘埃恒星形成区域一样致密。在匹配分辨率下对这16个星系的叠加中，870微米和F770W的轮廓在8千秒差距内紧密吻合，对F770W叠加的核球加盘分解给出了核球与总体的比值为0.50。使用CIGALE对径向分箱的SED进行拟合，我们发现消光从中心的A_V=2.6星等下降到r≳7千秒差距处的1.5星等，而比恒星形成率轮廓是平坦的。在这些星系中，核球已经就位，整个系统在大约10亿年内向致密静止星系演化。相比之下，在两个星系中，870微米发射的致密程度是F770W光的3到6倍，这表明它们仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。因此，我们的样本可能捕捉到了处于核球形成几个阶段的大质量星系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些星系正处于核球形成的不同阶段：多数星系核球已形成，将在大约10亿年内演化为致密静止星系；少数星系仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。静止帧K波段成像对测量恒星质量真实分布至关重要。

title: Efficient Interstellar Grain Growth from High Sticking Coefficients on Amorphous Carbon Dust
summary: Cosmic dust is the solid phase of the interstellar medium (ISM), classically assumed to be composed of carbonaceous and silicate grains with size distributions spanning $\sim 5~Å$ to $\sim 1~μ$m (Weingartner & Draine 2001, Draine & Li 2007, Hensley & Draine 2023). While it constitutes at most order-of-magnitude $\mathbf{1\%}$ of the ISM mass, dust is second only to stars in importance for the observable properties of galaxies (Zavala et al. 2021). Large uncertainties in the efficiency of grain growth obfuscate the relative contribution of the two dominant sources of dust in the Universe: direct production from evolved stars versus gas-phase accretion in the ambient ISM (Feldmann 2015, Esmerian & Gnedin 2022, Esmerian & Gnedin 2024). Advances in supercomputers have only recently allowed us to move beyond simple, idealized predictions of dust grain growth efficiencies (Leitch-Devlin & Williams 1985) with atomistic dynamical calculations (Bossion et al. 2024). We show that small carbon dust grains can grow significantly on timescales much shorter than the age of the universe and, in some ISM phases, comparable to the lifetimes of giant molecular clouds. Specifically, we perform molecular dynamics simulations of an amorphous carbon (a-C) grain surface impacted by gas-phase atoms of cosmologically abundant elements with realistic interstellar conditions, finding high ($\gtrsim 0.2$) sticking coefficients for all non-inert elements at all relevant gas and grain temperatures. We present the results of experiments conducted on similar dust candidate materials that support our theoretical calculations. Our results therefore confirm that the process of gas-phase accretion onto grains is likely an efficient mechanism for the growth of interstellar dust mass on astrophysical timescales, and plausibly central to the evolutionary life-cycle of interstellar grains at all cosmic epochs. (abridged)

AI.tldr: 本文通过分子动力学模拟和实验验证，发现非惰性气体原子在无定形碳颗粒表面的粘附系数高达0.2以上，表明气体吸积是星际尘埃在宇宙学时间尺度上高效增长的关键机制。
AI.motivation: 星际尘埃（碳质和硅酸盐颗粒）对星系观测性质至关重要，但其两种主要来源（恒星直接产生 vs. 星际介质气体吸积）的相对贡献因颗粒增长效率的不确定性而模糊不清，亟需更精确的原子尺度动力学计算。
AI.method: 采用分子动力学模拟，模拟无定形碳（a-C）颗粒表面在真实星际条件下与宇宙中丰度较高的气相原子碰撞的过程，计算各元素的粘附系数；同时进行类似尘埃候选材料的实验验证。
AI.result: 在所有相关的气体和颗粒温度下，非惰性元素的粘附系数均≥0.2；小碳颗粒可在远小于宇宙年龄的时间尺度上显著增长，某些星际介质相中的增长时标甚至与巨分子云的寿命相当。
AI.conclusion: 气体吸积是星际尘埃质量增长的高效机制，可能在所有宇宙学时期星际颗粒的演化生命周期中起核心作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙尘埃是星际介质（ISM）的固相，经典假设由碳质和硅酸盐颗粒组成，其尺寸分布范围约为5 Å至1 μm（Weingartner & Draine 2001, Draine & Li 2007, Hensley & Draine 2023）。虽然尘埃最多只占ISM质量的约1%，但就星系可观测性质的重要性而言，尘埃仅次于恒星（Zavala et al. 2021）。颗粒增长效率的巨大不确定性模糊了宇宙中尘埃两个主要来源的相对贡献：演化恒星的直接产生与周围ISM中的气相吸积（Feldmann 2015, Esmerian & Gnedin 2022, Esmerian & Gnedin 2024）。直到最近，超级计算机的进步才使我们能够超越简单、理想化的尘埃颗粒增长效率预测（Leitch-Devlin & Williams 1985），进行原子级动力学计算（Bossion et al. 2024）。我们表明，小碳质尘埃颗粒可以在远短于宇宙年龄的时间尺度上显著增长，并且在某些ISM相中，其增长时间尺度可与巨分子云的寿命相当。具体而言，我们对无定形碳（a-C）颗粒表面进行了分子动力学模拟，该表面受到宇宙学丰度元素的气相原子在真实星际条件下的撞击，发现所有非惰性元素在所有相关气体和尘埃温度下都具有高（≥0.2）的粘附系数。我们展示了在类似尘埃候选材料上进行的实验结果，这些结果支持我们的理论计算。因此，我们的结果证实，气相吸积到颗粒上的过程很可能是星际尘埃质量在天体物理时间尺度上增长的高效机制，并且可能在所有宇宙学时期星际颗粒的演化生命周期中起核心作用。（删节版）
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，气体吸积是星际尘埃质量增长的高效机制，可能在所有宇宙学时期星际颗粒的演化生命周期中起核心作用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Sticking coefficients for selected elements onto amorphous carbon as a function of gas temperature \(T_{g}\) and dust temperature \(T_{D}\) . Solid points indicate chemisorption sticking coefficients and transparent points indicate physisorption. Note that this distinction is made at the end of the simulation run-time, and the chemisorption values shown are therefore lower limits (on pure a-C dust, but see text for discussion on hydrogenation) for astrophysical purposes, since some of the physisorbed atoms may be chemisorbed on longer time-scales. Stars indicate estimated asymptotic total chemisorption values taking the physisorption-to-chemisorption probabilities for H, C, and O from [ 10 ] . Solid, dashed, and dotted lines indicate polynomial fits – calculated in \(S_{i},\;\log_{10}(T_{g})\) space – to the chemisorption, physisorption, and total chemisorption estimates respectively, described further in the Methods.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：选定元素在无定形碳上的粘附系数随气体温度 \(T_{g}\) 和尘埃温度 \(T_{D}\) 的变化。实心点表示化学吸附粘附系数，透明点表示物理吸附。请注意，此区分是在模拟运行结束时做出的，因此所示的化学吸附值是用于天体物理目的的下限（在纯a-C尘埃上，但关于氢化的讨论见正文），因为一些物理吸附的原子可能在更长的时间尺度上被化学吸附。星号表示根据H、C和O从[10]的物理吸附到化学吸附概率估算的渐近总化学吸附值。实线、虚线和点线分别表示在 \(S_{i},\;\log_{10}(T_{g})\) 空间中计算的对化学吸附、物理吸附和总化学吸附估计值的多项式拟合，详见方法部分。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Same as Fig. 1 , additionally showing comparisons to our laboratory data and previous theoretical estimates. Solid, dashed, and dotted lines indicate previous estimates of sticking coefficients on graphite from [ 53 ] – different line-styles indicate grain temperatures of 300, 100, and 3 K respectively, while solid black indicates chemisorption and transparent gray indicates physisorption. For H, the gray rectangles indicate experimental constraints as described in the text: the lighter gray corresponds to dust surface temperatures of both 100 K and 300 K, while the darker gray corresponds to a dust surface temperature of 10 K. Note that these constraints represent lower limits on the combined chemisorption and physisorption sticking probability. The estimated total chemisorption sticking coefficients from [ 10 ] , in which \(T_{g}=T_{D}\) , are shown in blue for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：与图1相同，另外显示了与我们的实验室数据和先前理论估计的比较。实线、虚线和点线表示先前对石墨上粘附系数的估计，来自[53]——不同的线型分别表示尘埃温度为300 K、100 K和3 K，而实心黑色表示化学吸附，透明灰色表示物理吸附。对于H，灰色矩形表示正文中描述的实验约束：浅灰色对应尘埃表面温度100 K和300 K，深灰色对应尘埃表面温度10 K。请注意，这些约束代表了化学吸附和物理吸附粘附概率组合的下限。来自[10]的估计总化学吸附粘附系数（其中 \(T_{g}=T_{D}\) ）以蓝色显示以作比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Timescales for grain growth via accretion of a \(50~{\AA }\) radius grain in the different phases of the ISM with our calculated sticking coefficients (Equation 1 ). Lines show decades in characteristic grain growth timescale from \(10^{2}\) to \(10^{9}\) years as a function of interstellar gas-phase temperature and density. We also show with a dashed line \(\tau=10^{9}~{{yr}}\) for a larger \(a_{D}=0.1~\mu{{m}}\) grain, and with dot-dashed \(\tau=10^{9}\) yr for timescales multiplied by \(10^{2}\) (offset slightly for visibility) to account for a maximal duty-cycle of de-hydrogenation, see text. Overlaid in blue ellipses are the approximate densities and temperatures of the main thermodynamic phases of dense interstellar gas: the Warm Ionized Medium: WIM, Warm Neutral Medium: WNM, the Unstable Neutral Medium: UNM, the Cold Neutral Medium: CNM, diffuse molecular gas: Diffuse H 2 , and dense molecular gas: Dense H 2 [ 21 , 52 , 37 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：使用我们计算的粘附系数（方程1），在ISM不同相中通过吸积增长一个半径为 \(50~{\AA }\) 的颗粒的时间尺度。线条显示特征颗粒增长时间尺度从 \(10^{2}\) 年到 \(10^{9}\) 年的数量级，作为星际气相温度和密度的函数。我们还用虚线显示了较大 \(a_{D}=0.1~\mu{{m}}\) 颗粒的 \(\tau=10^{9}~{{yr}}\) ，并用点划线显示了时间尺度乘以 \(10^{2}\) （为可见性略微偏移）的 \(\tau=10^{9}\) yr，以考虑脱氢的最大占空比，见正文。叠加的蓝色椭圆是稠密星际气体主要热力学相的近似密度和温度：暖电离介质（WIM）、暖中性介质（WNM）、不稳定中性介质（UNM）、冷中性介质（CNM）、弥散分子气体（Diffuse H₂）和稠密分子气体（Dense H₂）[21, 52, 37]。

title: Microlensing of Microlensing: Effects of Random Stars on the Double-Source-Plane Gravitational Lens
summary: Microlensing, the influence of stars within a galactic gravitational lens, has emerged as a powerful probe of compact mass and, through differential magnification, sub-parsec scale sources at cosmological distances. The recent discovery of a double-source-plane gravitational lens system in which the most distant source is a quasar offers the prospect of compound microlensing, in which quasar light rays are influenced by compact masses within the two foreground lensing galaxies. Here, we present the first numerical simulations of this "microlensing of microlensing". We consider the recently discovered "Einstein zig-zag" lens, J1721+8842, as a fiducial case, and construct microlensing magnification maps for each of the six quasar images in this system. Due to the secondary microlensing effects of the myriad of initial microimages, the resulting maps contain more complex caustic features than seen in the case of single plane microlensing. This is reflected in the expected lightcurves seen for each of the images.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对双源平面引力透镜系统中的“复合微引力透镜效应”（微引力透镜的微引力透镜）进行了数值模拟，以J1721+8842系统为例，发现次级微透镜效应会产生更复杂的焦散结构，并影响各像的光变曲线。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 微引力透镜效应，即星系引力透镜中恒星的影响，已成为探测致密质量以及通过微分放大效应研究宇宙学距离上亚秒差距尺度源的有力工具。最近发现的一个双源平面引力透镜系统中，最远的源是一颗类星体，这为复合微引力透镜效应提供了前景，其中类星体的光线受到两个前景透镜星系内致密质量的影响。在此，我们首次展示了这种“微引力透镜的微引力透镜”的数值模拟。我们以最近发现的“爱因斯坦之字形”透镜J1721+8842作为基准案例，并为该系统中六个类星体像中的每一个构建了微引力透镜放大图。由于大量初始微像的次级微引力透镜效应，所得放大图包含比单平面微引力透镜情况更复杂的焦散特征。这反映在每个像的预期光变曲线中。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，首次实现了双源平面引力透镜系统中的复合微引力透镜效应的数值模拟，揭示了其更复杂的焦散结构和对光变曲线的影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Illustration of the fiducial DSPL configuration employed in this study, the Einstein zig-zag lens J1721+8842. Light rays from source 2 (s2, a quasar at \(z=2.38\) ) are deflected by source 1 (s1, a galaxy at \(z=1.885\) ) and the foreground lens at \(z=0.184\) , producing six lensed images labelled \(A\) – \(F\) . The observer’s sky projection shows the resultant image. The dashed rays denoting the trajectory of images \(D\) and \(F\) to the s2 plane, show the “zig-zag” procedure in action, where the images switch places between the s1 plane and the foreground lens plane. We discuss our approach to modelling of this system in Appendix A .

title: Supermagnified Stars in Lensing Clusters and Small-Scale Structure in the Dark Matter
comment: HWO Proceedings Part II: Mission Framework, Technology, and Broader Contributions
summary: Supermagnified stars, discovered by HST and JWST in lensing clusters of galaxies, are luminous stars in source galaxies lying near lensing caustics that are magnified by large factors ($\sim 1000$), making them detectable at cosmological distances. Intracluster stars in the lens modify the large-scale caustic into a corrugated network of micro-caustics, causing frequent microlensing events of the supermagnified stars. The frequency and lightcurves of these micro-caustic crossings are extremely sensitive to any small-scale, low amplitude surface density fluctations in the lensing cluster, making them a unique probe to dark matter minihalos or any small-scale irregularities. Furthermore, the disks of supermagnified stars can be resolved (at cosmological distances!) from photometric monitoring of micro-caustic crossing events, exploiting the limb darkening effect. Examples are shown of model lightcurves to fit the Kelly et al. (2018) observations of the first supermagnified star discovered. The unique sensitivity and angular resolution of the Habitable Worlds Observatory enables photometry of microlensing events of supermagnified stars sensitive to small-scale structure different from intracluster stars, a probe to the nature of dark matter that is not accessible to other observations at present.

AI.tldr: 本文提出超放大恒星（由HST和JWST在星系团透镜中发现）因星系团内恒星产生的微透镜事件，可用于探测暗物质小尺度结构，并借助HWO望远镜实现独特的高分辨率观测。
AI.motivation: 利用超放大恒星在透镜星系团中经历的微透镜事件，探测暗物质小尺度晕或任何小尺度不规则结构，以及通过临边昏暗效应分辨恒星盘面。
AI.method: 分析微透镜事件的光变曲线对透镜星系团内小尺度、低振幅面密度涨落的敏感性，并展示模型光变曲线拟合观测数据（Kelly et al. 2018）的示例。
AI.result: 微透镜事件的频率和光变曲线对暗物质小尺度结构极其敏感；HWO望远镜可提供独特的光度监测能力，揭示不同于星系团内恒星的小尺度结构。
AI.conclusion: 超放大恒星的微透镜观测是当前其他观测手段无法替代的暗物质属性探针，HWO望远镜将大幅提升该研究的灵敏度与角分辨率。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超放大恒星是由哈勃太空望远镜和詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜在星系团透镜中发现的，它们是位于透镜焦散线附近源星系中的明亮恒星，被放大极大倍数（约1000倍），从而在宇宙学距离上可被探测到。透镜中的星团内恒星将大尺度焦散线修改为波纹状的微焦散线网络，导致超放大恒星频繁发生微引力透镜事件。这些微焦散线穿越的频率和光变曲线对透镜星系团中任何小尺度、低振幅的表面密度涨落极为敏感，使其成为探测暗物质迷你晕或任何小尺度不规则性的独特探针。此外，通过利用临边昏暗效应，对微焦散线穿越事件进行光度监测，可以分辨超放大恒星的盘面（在宇宙学距离上！）。文中展示了模型光变曲线的示例，用于拟合Kelly等人（2018年）对首个被发现的超放大恒星的观测。宜居世界天文台独特的灵敏度和角分辨率使得对超放大恒星微引力透镜事件的光度测量能够敏感地区分不同于星团内恒星的小尺度结构，这是一种目前其他观测手段无法触及的暗物质性质探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，超放大恒星的微透镜观测是当前其他观测手段无法替代的暗物质属性探针，HWO望远镜将大幅提升该研究的灵敏度与角分辨率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Magnification \(\mu\) of a star crossing a micro-caustic, as a function of the distance from the star center to the micro-caustic, \(\ell\) , divided by the stellar radius \(R\) . A point source has the lightcurve \(\mu=(\ell/R)^{-1/2}\) (dashed blue line) and disappears at \(\ell -R\) . Including limb darkening modeled as a linear decrease of surface brightness with projected radius results in the dotted curves, with increasing fraction of surface brightness decline from the center to the edge ( \(C\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：一颗恒星穿越微焦散线时的放大率 \(\mu\) ，作为从恒星中心到微焦散线的距离 \(\ell\) 除以恒星半径 \(R\) 的函数。点源的光变曲线为 \(\mu=(\ell/R)^{-1/2}\) （蓝色虚线），并在 \(\ell -R\) 处消失。将临边昏暗效应建模为表面亮度随投影半径线性递减，得到虚线曲线，其中从中心到边缘的表面亮度下降比例递增（ \(C\) ）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Observations of the Icarus supermagnified star (Kelly et al. , 2018 ) are shown as orange and green triangles with error bars for the F125W and F160W filters, respectively. The orange points are raised by \(0.03\,\mu{Jy}\) for clarity. A 6-parameter, single micro-caustic crossing model fit to both filters is shown (solid line for F125W, dashed line for F160W).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对伊卡洛斯超放大恒星的观测（Kelly等人，2018年）以橙色和绿色三角形表示，分别对应F125W和F160W滤光片，并带有误差棒。橙色点向上偏移了 \(0.03\,\mu{Jy}\) 以便清晰显示。图中展示了针对两个滤光片拟合的6参数单微焦散线穿越模型（实线为F125W，虚线为F160W）。

title: Molecular gas hidden in plain sight in the early Universe
comment: Accepted for publication as Letter to the Editor in Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary:
We report the discovery of an extreme intervening molecular absorber at zabs = 4.1 towards the z = 4.7 quasar SDSS J080023.02+305101.22 revealed through strong H2 absorption that had remained unnoticed in archival data for about two decades. The system, which we analysed with new VLT/X-shooter observations, has a metallicity of about one-fifth the solar value, in line with the moderate dust reddening AV~0.06 mag. More strikingly, it exhibits the highest molecular fraction, fH2 = 2N(H2)/(2N(H2) + N(HI))~=60%, measured at z>0 from direct determinations of both atomic and molecular hydrogen column densities. Notably, this fraction is comparable to the very highest values in the Local Group. The inferred fH2 still represents a conservative lower limit to the local molecular fraction since the H i absorption very likely includes atomic gas unrelated to the actual molecular component, as indicated by the wide (Delta v~500 km/s) multi-component low-ionisation metal profile.
  The detection of such a system at early cosmic times is remarkable given the limited number of quasar spectra probing z>4. It suggests an unexpectedly high incidence of H2, with important implications for the evolution of molecular gas. This high incidence may be driven by high average densities and enhanced turbulence at those redshifts. At the same time, our results also highlight possible observational biases, both in quasar selection and in recognising strong H2 absorption, suggesting that a significant fraction of molecular gas may remain undetected, in particular near the peak of star formation. The present system offers a unique benchmark for developing efficient detection algorithms. Further progress will benefit from colour-independent quasar surveys, while constraining the physical conditions and environments of such extreme absorbers will require observations on future extremely large telescopes.

AI.tldr: 在z=4.1处发现一个极端分子吸收体，其分子比例fH2≈60%为z>0最高，暗示早期宇宙分子气体丰度超出预期，并存在观测偏差。
AI.motivation: 探索早期宇宙（z>4）分子气体的存在与性质，因为此前此类高红移分子吸收体极为罕见，对理解宇宙早期恒星形成和星系演化至关重要。
AI.method: 利用VLT/X-shooter新观测数据，分析对z=4.7类星体的吸收光谱，测量H2和HI柱密度，计算分子比例和金属丰度。
AI.result: 1) 金属丰度约为太阳的1/5；2) 尘埃红化AV≈0.06 mag；3) 分子比例fH2≈60%，为z>0最高值；4) 该比例仍为下限，因HI可能包含非分子气体成分。
AI.conclusion: 早期宇宙分子气体可能比预期更普遍，现有观测存在选择偏差，需依赖颜色无关的类星体巡天和未来极大望远镜进一步研究。

artifacts.abstract_zh:
我们报告发现了一个极端的中间分子吸收体，其吸收红移为 zabs = 4.1，朝向红移 z = 4.7 的类星体 SDSS J080023.02+305101.22。该吸收体通过强烈的 H2 吸收揭示，而在档案数据中约二十年未被注意到。我们利用新的 VLT/X-shooter 观测分析了该系统，其金属丰度约为太阳值的五分之一，与中等程度的尘埃红化 AV~0.06 星等一致。更引人注目的是，它表现出最高的分子分数 fH2 = 2N(H2)/(2N(H2) + N(HI))~=60%，这是通过直接测定原子和分子氢柱密度在 z>0 处测量到的。值得注意的是，该分数与本地群中最高值相当。推断的 fH2 仍代表本地分子分数的保守下限，因为 H I 吸收很可能包含与实际分子成分无关的原子气体，这由宽（Delta v~500 km/s）多分量低电离金属轮廓所指示。
  在早期宇宙时期探测到这样的系统是引人注目的，考虑到探测 z>4 的类星体光谱数量有限。它表明 H2 的出现率出乎意料地高，这对分子气体的演化具有重要意义。这种高出现率可能由那些红移处的高平均密度和增强的湍流驱动。同时，我们的结果也突显了可能的观测偏差，无论是在类星体选择还是在识别强 H2 吸收方面，表明相当一部分分子气体可能未被探测到，特别是在恒星形成峰值附近。当前系统为开发高效探测算法提供了独特的基准。进一步的进展将受益于与颜色无关的类星体巡天，而约束此类极端吸收体的物理条件和环境则需要未来极大望远镜的观测。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，早期宇宙分子气体可能比预期更普遍，现有观测存在选择偏差，需依赖颜色无关的类星体巡天和未来极大望远镜进一步研究。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : X-shooter spectrum of the \(z=4.67\) quasar J 0800+3051 (black, smoothed for visual purpose) featuring a DLA at \(z=4.096\) (red arrow). The composite quasar spectrum from Selsing et al. ( 2016 ) is shown in grey, and the same composite reddened by \(A_{V}\) =0.06 mag at the DLA redshift is shown as a purple dashed line. The significant decrease in transmission at short wavelengths (orange shaded area) is largely due to strong \({H}_{2}\) absorption lines. The inset shows spectra in this region obtained with different instruments (black line with blue shade), with the synthetic \({H}_{2}\) profile convolved to the corresponding line spread function (red).
figures.caption_zh: 图 1：红移 \(z=4.67\) 的类星体 J 0800+3051 的 X-shooter 光谱（黑色，为视觉目的平滑处理），显示了一个红移 \(z=4.096\) 的 DLA（红色箭头）。来自 Selsing 等人（2016）的复合类星体光谱以灰色显示，同一复合光谱在 DLA 红移处经 \(A_{V}\) =0.06 星等红化的结果以紫色虚线显示。短波长处透射率的显著下降（橙色阴影区域）主要是由强 \({H}_{2}\) 吸收线引起的。插图显示了用不同仪器获得的该区域光谱（黑色线带蓝色阴影），以及卷积到相应线扩展函数的合成 \({H}_{2}\) 轮廓（红色）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Column density of molecular vs atomic hydrogen measured from Lyman-Werner and Lyman lines, respectively. Measurements in intervening DLAs (Balashev et al., 2019 , and references therein) are represented by circles and coloured by redshift. The \(z=4.1\) system towards J 0800+3051 is highlighted by a larger symbol. title: The Intrinsic Multiphase Gas--Black Hole Connection across Scales in IllustrisTNG
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 1 table. ApJ accepted. Comments are welcome
summary: The relationship between supermassive black holes and the multiphase circumgalactic medium is central to understanding the co-evolution of galaxies and their central black holes. We investigate this relationship using the IllustrisTNG100 simulation with a sample of 5089 central galaxies at $z=0$, measuring the partial correlation between central black hole mass and the mass of cold ($T < 10^4$K), cool ($10^4 \le T < 10^5$K), warm ($10^5 \le T < 10^6$K), and hot ($T \ge 10^6$K) gas within $0.03R_{200}$, $0.15R_{200}$, and $R_{200}$, after accounting for stellar and dark matter halo mass. We find that after removing these confounding factors, black hole mass shows a significant negative partial correlation ($ρ\approx -0.37$) with cold gas within $R_{200}$ and $0.15R_{200}$, whereas warm and hot gas exhibit no substantial intrinsic correlation. The residual plane reveals a threshold pattern: galaxies with over-massive black holes show systematically reduced cold gas, consistent with the cumulative impact of AGN feedback. The anti-correlation persists across environments with a weak trend in local density, and varies with galaxy type (star-forming, green valley, and quenched). These results provide a quantitative multiphase diagnostic of AGN feedback in TNG and support a picture in which feedback progressively removes cold gas, offering testable predictions for future multiwavelength surveys.

AI.tldr: 基于IllustrisTNG100模拟，研究发现超大质量黑洞质量与星系周冷气体质量呈显著负相关（ρ≈-0.37），而暖热气体无显著关联，支持AGN反馈逐渐移除冷气体的图景。
AI.motivation: 理解超大质量黑洞与多相星系周介质的关系，对于揭示星系与中心黑洞的共同演化至关重要。
AI.method: 使用IllustrisTNG100模拟中5089个中心星系样本，在控制恒星质量和暗物质晕质量后，测量黑洞质量与不同温度气体（冷、凉、温、热）在多个半径范围内的偏相关。
AI.result: 黑洞质量与冷气体呈显著负偏相关（ρ≈-0.37），与暖热气体无本质关联；存在阈值模式：黑洞质量过大的星系冷气体系统性减少。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持AGN反馈逐渐移除冷气体的物理图像，为未来多波段巡天提供了可检验的预测。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超大质量黑洞与多相星系周介质之间的关系是理解星系及其中心黑洞共同演化的核心。我们利用IllustrisTNG100模拟，对z=0处的5089个中央星系样本，测量了在考虑恒星和暗物质晕质量后，中心黑洞质量与0.03R_{200}、0.15R_{200}和R_{200}内冷（T < 10^4K）、温（10^4 ≤ T < 10^5K）、暖（10^5 ≤ T < 10^6K）和热（T ≥ 10^6K）气体质量之间的偏相关。我们发现，在去除这些混杂因素后，黑洞质量与R_{200}和0.15R_{200}内的冷气体呈现显著的负偏相关（ρ≈ -0.37），而暖气体和热气体则没有表现出实质性的内在相关性。残差平面揭示了一个阈值模式：黑洞质量过大的星系系统性地表现出冷气体减少，这与AGN反馈的累积影响一致。这种反相关在不同环境中持续存在，与局部密度呈弱趋势，并随星系类型（恒星形成、绿谷和熄灭）而变化。这些结果为TNG中AGN反馈提供了定量的多相诊断，并支持反馈逐渐移除冷气体的图像，为未来的多波段巡天提供了可检验的预测。

title: Measuring satellite galaxy subhalo masses in redMaPPer clusters with UNIONS weak lensing data
comment: Accepted for publication to MNRAS as of July 13, 2026. Pending for proofs. DOI: 10.1093/mnras/stag1318
summary: In this work, we present the observed galaxy-galaxy lensing signal of satellite galaxies in rich clusters obtained from the Ultraviolet Near-Infrared Optical Northern Survey (UNIONS). Such observations are crucial for understanding dark matter halo physics and interaction dynamics in the cluster environment. Our goal is to investigate the tidal stripping of cluster subhalos. Theoretical predictions, supported by recent studies, suggest that as satellite galaxies fall into clusters, their dark matter halos are stripped and dispersed into the cluster's main halo, while their stellar mass remains relatively intact. A robust method to probe this phenomenon is through statistical measurements of the excess surface mass density of satellite galaxies at different cluster-centric distances. Our results reveal a significant lensing signal, with strong statistical power from the large number of lens-source pairs. A simple model used in the fitting process to constrain subhalo masses effectively reproduces the observed lensing signal at relevant satellite-centric distances. However, it lacks the complexity to accurately fit the excess surface density at larger distances, where the host cluster halo dominates. We measure the subhalo-to-stellar mass ratio as a function of cluster-centric radius and find a strong positive trend. These results confirm tidal stripping or other environmental processes that impact the relative masses of a satellite galaxy's stellar component and its dark matter halo.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用UNIONS巡天数据观测富星系团中卫星星系的星系-星系引力透镜信号，发现子结构晕与恒星质量比随星系团中心距离增加而增大，证实了潮汐剥离等环境过程对卫星星系暗物质晕的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解星系团环境中暗物质晕的物理机制和相互作用动力学，特别是探测卫星星系子结构晕的潮汐剥离现象。
AI.method: 利用UNIONS巡天数据测量卫星星系在不同星系团中心距离处的过量表面质量密度，并通过简单模型拟合约束子结构晕质量。
AI.result: 观测到显著的引力透镜信号；子结构晕与恒星质量比随星系团中心距离增加呈现强正相关趋势；简单模型能复现近距离信号，但无法准确拟合远距离处宿主团晕主导的过量表面密度。
AI.conclusion: 结果证实了潮汐剥离或其他环境过程会影响卫星星系恒星成分与暗物质晕的相对质量。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们展示了利用紫外-近红外光学北方巡天（UNIONS）获得的富星系团中卫星星系的观测星系-星系透镜信号。这类观测对于理解暗物质晕物理以及星系团环境中的相互作用动力学至关重要。我们的目标是研究星系团子晕的潮汐剥离。理论预测以及近期研究支持，当卫星星系落入星系团时，其暗物质晕被剥离并弥散到星系团的主晕中，而它们的恒星质量则相对保持完整。探测这一现象的一种稳健方法是通过统计测量不同星系团中心距离处卫星星系的面质量密度超出量。我们的结果揭示了显著的透镜信号，得益于大量透镜-源对而具有强大的统计能力。在拟合过程中用于约束子晕质量的简单模型有效地再现了相关卫星中心距离处的观测透镜信号。然而，该模型缺乏足够的复杂性来准确拟合更大距离处的面密度超出量，在此处宿主星系团晕占主导。我们测量了子晕与恒星质量比随星系团中心半径的变化，并发现了一个强烈的正相关趋势。这些结果证实了潮汐剥离或其他影响卫星星系恒星成分与暗物质晕相对质量的环境过程。

title: The dynamical environment of the high-mass star-forming region G28.288$-$0.364
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, Accepted for publication in Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: Massive stars form within deeply embedded dust cores, and the development of hypercompact and ultracompact H II regions characterizes their early evolution. Identifying and analyzing such regions is essential for understanding the physical processes that govern massive star formation and the transitions between early evolutionary stages. In this article, we investigate the physical and kinematic properties of the massive star-forming region G28.288$-$0.364 to constrain the evolutionary stages of embedded H II regions and the surrounding cores. We analyze multiwavelength observations, including uGMRT radio continuum data; archival continuum and radio recombination line data from the GLOSTAR-D survey; high-angular-resolution ALMA Band 3 radio recombination line and 1.36-mm dust continuum data from the ALMAGAL survey; and complementary molecular line tracers. We derive spectral indices, measure linewidths and velocities of the radio recombination line emission, identify compact dust cores using dendrogram analysis, and estimate their physical properties. The radio continuum emission exhibits a positive spectral index, consistent with partially optically thick free-free emission. High-resolution observations resolve the ionized gas into two distinct components with physical sizes of $\sim$ 0.06 pc, and their RRL linewidths ($\sim$ 37 and 32 km s$^{-1}$, respectively) indicate that one component is in a transitional stage between hypercompact and ultracompact H II regions, while the other is more evolved. The 1.36-mm dust continuum data reveal five dust cores with surface densities consistent with the theoretical threshold for massive star formation. In summary, these results highlight the complex and sequential nature of massive star formation in clustered environments and demonstrate the importance of high angular resolution observations for resolving the early evolution of massive stars.

AI.tldr: 本文利用多波段观测数据（uGMRT、GLOSTAR-D、ALMAGAL等）对大质量恒星形成区G28.288$-$0.364进行了物理和运动学性质分析，识别出两个离子氢区（一个处于超致密与超致密过渡阶段，另一个更演化）和五个满足大质量恒星形成阈值条件的尘埃核，揭示了大质量恒星在成团环境中演化的复杂性和序列性。
AI.motivation: 大质量恒星形成于深埋的尘埃核中，超致密和超致密H II区的发展标志其早期演化。识别和分析这些区域对于理解大质量恒星形成的物理过程以及早期演化阶段之间的转变至关重要。
AI.method: 分析了包括uGMRT射电连续谱数据、GLOSTAR-D巡天的存档连续谱和射电复合线数据、ALMAGAL巡天的高角分辨率ALMA Band 3射电复合线和1.36毫米尘埃连续谱数据，以及补充分子线示踪物。导出了谱指数，测量了射电复合线发射的线宽和速度，利用树状图分析识别紧致尘埃核，并估计其物理性质。
AI.result: 射电连续谱呈现正谱指数，符合部分光学厚自由-自由辐射。高分辨率观测将电离气体分解为两个不同成分，物理尺寸约0.06 pc，其RRL线宽（分别约37和32 km/s）表明一个成分处于超致密和超致密H II区之间的过渡阶段，另一个则更为演化。1.36毫米尘埃连续谱揭示五个尘埃核，其表面密度符合大质量恒星形成的理论阈值。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果突显了大质量恒星在成团环境中演化的复杂性和序列性，并证明了高角分辨率观测对于解析大质量恒星早期演化的关键作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 大质量恒星形成于深度嵌入的尘埃核中，超致密和极超致密H II区的形成标志着它们的早期演化。识别和分析这些区域对于理解支配大质量恒星形成的物理过程以及早期演化阶段之间的转变至关重要。本文研究了高质量恒星形成区G28.288$-$0.364的物理和运动学性质，以约束嵌入H II区及其周围核的演化阶段。我们分析了多波段观测数据，包括uGMRT射电连续谱数据；来自GLOSTAR-D巡天的存档连续谱和射电复合线数据；来自ALMAGAL巡天的高角分辨率ALMA Band 3射电复合线和1.36毫米尘埃连续谱数据；以及补充的分子线示踪剂。我们推导了谱指数，测量了射电复合线发射的线宽和速度，使用树状图分析识别了致密尘埃核，并估计了它们的物理性质。射电连续谱发射呈现正谱指数，与部分光学厚的自由-自由发射一致。高分辨率观测将电离气体解析为两个不同的成分，其物理尺寸约为0.06 pc，它们的RRL线宽（分别约为37和32 km s$^{-1}$）表明一个成分处于超致密和极超致密H II区之间的过渡阶段，而另一个则更演化。1.36毫米尘埃连续谱数据揭示了五个尘埃核，其表面密度与大质量恒星形成的理论阈值一致。总之，这些结果突显了大质量恒星在成团环境中演化的复杂性和序列性，并证明了高角分辨率观测对于解析大质量恒星早期演化的关键作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些结果突显了大质量恒星在成团环境中演化的复杂性和序列性，并证明了高角分辨率观测对于解析大质量恒星早期演化的关键作用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Three-colour image showing emission at 870 \(\mu\) m (red), 4.5 \(\mu\) m (green), and 3.6 \(\mu\) m (blue) from the ATLASGAL (870 \(\mu\) m) and GLIMPSE (4.5 \(\mu\) m and 3.6 \(\mu\) m) surveys. The blue contours correspond to the radio continuum emission from the CORNISH survey, starting at the \(3\sigma\) level with \(\sigma=0.5\) mJy beam -1 . The position of the extended green object (EGO) identified by Cyganowski et al. ( 2011 ) is marked by the yellow circle. The emission is displayed on a logarithmic scale to highlight the faint components.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：来自ATLASGAL（870 \(\mu\) m）和GLIMPSE（4.5 \(\mu\) m和3.6 \(\mu\) m）巡天的三色图像，显示870 \(\mu\) m（红色）、4.5 \(\mu\) m（绿色）和3.6 \(\mu\) m（蓝色）的发射。蓝色等高线对应于CORNISH巡天的射电连续谱发射，从\(3\sigma\)水平开始，\(\sigma=0.5\) mJy beam -1。由Cyganowski等人（2011）识别的扩展绿色天体（EGO）的位置用黄色圆圈标出。发射以对数尺度显示以突出微弱成分。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Average GLOSTAR-D RRL spectrum toward G28.288 \(-\) 0.364 (top), extracted from a circular region with a diameter equal to one synthesized beam of the GLOSTAR-D RRL map. Similar RRL spectra are also extracted toward CORNISH-A (middle) and CORNISH-B (bottom) using the ALMA Band 3 H63 \(\delta\) RRL data. The orange curves show the Gaussian fits to the line profiles, while the green dotted lines mark the systemic velocity reported by Sanhueza et al. ( 2012 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：朝向G28.288 \(-\) 0.364的平均GLOSTAR-D RRL谱（顶部），从直径等于GLOSTAR-D RRL图一个合成波束的圆形区域提取。类似的RRL谱也使用ALMA Band 3 H63 \(\delta\) RRL数据朝向CORNISH-A（中部）和CORNISH-B（底部）提取。橙色曲线显示对谱线轮廓的高斯拟合，而绿色虚线标记了Sanhueza等人（2012）报告的系统速度。
